description: Learn Phonics with this Snappy Learner book. This series is perfect for helping children practise all the new things they are learning in school. Colourful clear activities for fun learning. The pull-out reward chart with reusable star stickers helps encourage your child and boosts confidence. Extra reusable reward stickers are throughout to encourage your child's ongoing participation. The activities are linked to school topics to help your child's development. This book is suited for ages 5-7, Reception - Year 2. The book is 20.5cm x 29.5cm (8¼" x 11½") Read more
